response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies are not designed for aquatic environments  
their immune system reacts to peanuts and not to water  
the chemicals in peanuts cause an allergic reaction that is not present in water  
the body lacks the necessary adaptations to survive in water  
the lungs and heart are not suited for underwater survival  
the blood cannot circulate effectively in water  
the body cannot regulate temperature in aquatic environments  
the digestive system is not adapted to process water  
the skin cannot prevent water from entering the body  

Sec. 2  
the lungs are not designed to extract oxygen from water  
the body cannot maintain proper fluid balance in water  
the heart cannot pump blood efficiently in water  
the body cannot regulate pH levels in water  
the skin cannot prevent water from entering the body  
the body cannot handle the pressure of water  
the body cannot function properly in water  
the body cannot sustain life in water
